project_identity.name: RoboCurriculum AI
project_identity.core_philosophy: Digital precision meets physical engineering. The interface should feel like a high-end cleanroom laboratory.

visual_enhancers.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 rounded-xl
visual_enhancers.border_tracing: Use a subtle animated gradient border for active states or premium features.

landing_page.hero_section: Split view: Left text, Right 3D interactive or Hero Image.

dashboard.navigation: Sidebar for Teachers, Topbar for Students (to maximize workspace).

buttons.primary: rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900

cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-colors

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-md border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500

3d_strategy.usage: Use a simple rotating geometric robot arm or floating abstract tech shapes (cubes/spheres with wireframes) in the Hero section.
3d_strategy.fallback: If 3D is too complex, use the 'circuit_texture' image with a slow pan animation.

charts_and_data.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines. Use tooltips with heavy shadows. Colors should match the palette (Blue for progress, Orange for alerts).
charts_and_data.components: AreaChart for progress, BarChart for comparisons, RadialBar for skills.

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is only used for non-essential text. Use text-slate-700 for readable content.
accessibility_rules.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-blue-500) are mandatory.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 'Layout' component that applies the background grid pattern globally.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings to give it a tech feel.
Ensure the Dashboard is dense but readable (Bento Box style).
For the Coding Task page, use a split-pane layout (Instructions Left, Code Editor Right, Output Bottom).

universal_guidelines.avoid_slop: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
universal_guidelines.micro_interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Inputs should glow on focus.
